observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
target is a board:// URI pointing to item-e0b96259.

Serves as a timestamped ledger entry rather than a content-bearing document.

Uses a URI scheme (board://) to identify cross-system targets.
concerns: The file contains no payload or content beyond identifiers, so its usefulness depends entirely on external resolution.
The semantics of 'board_items' and the nature of the referenced board item are not defined inside the file.
notes: A metadata stub that records an attachment-to-board-item association in the dragnet-development channel.

contribution: Provides a persistent, typed link between a channel attachment and a board item, along with a creation timestamp, supporting traceability without embedding the target content.
